title: Luffy on Amazon Lily
description: In the Amazon Lily storyline, this section centers on Boa Hancock, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #1 as the scene develops across pages 2–5.
scene: This scene advances the Amazon Lily conflict through Boa Hancock, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #10, focusing on the immediate stakes of luffy on amazon lily.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: How can you not like Frills?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Well... whatever, thanks for taking them off.

dialogue.speaker: Boa Hancock
dialogue.text: Well then, I'll be on my way.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Ah!! Will you give me a boat!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: That's why sailors never come by.

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: That's a problem-...!! There's no wind...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: That's terrible!!! It's already coming apart!!!

dialogue.speaker: Boa Hancock
dialogue.text: ... I'm not obligated to help you....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: ahh, that was close, damn it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ... I'm the one in trouble here....!!

dialogue.speaker: Boa Hancock
dialogue.text: If I get too friendly with you,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: What the hell are you doing!!?

summary: This scene advances the Amazon Lily conflict through Boa Hancock, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #10, focusing on the immediate stakes of luffy on amazon lily.
